name: ChiSq Selector
description: Chi-Squared feature selection, which selects categorical features to use for predicting a categorical label.

fields.name: numTopFeatures
fields.title: NumTopFeatures
fields.description: Number of features that selector will select (ordered by statistic value descending).

fields.name: percentile
fields.title: Percentile
fields.description: Percentile of features that selector will select, ordered by statistics value descending. Only applicable when selectorType is percentile

fields.name: fpr
fields.title: FPR
fields.description: The highest p-value for features to be kept. Only applicable when selectorType is fpr

fields.name: fdr
fields.title: FDR
fields.description: The upper bound of the expected false discovery rate. Only applicable when selectorType is fdr

fields.name: fwe
fields.title: FWE
fields.description: The upper bound of the expected family-wise error rate. Only applicable when selectorType is fwe

fields.name: selectorType
fields.title: Selector Type
fields.description: The selector type of the ChisqSelector.
